texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lake Bogoria Spa Resort - Kabarak Box 58 - 30403,
texts.text: Lake Bogoria Spa Resort - Kabarak Box 58 - 30403,

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Wish to take this opportunity to thank you and your company for the interest and business support to Lake Bogoria Spa Resort - Kabarak. In this respect we are pleased to offer the following comprehensive 2025 rates applicable to your Company.
texts.text: Wish to take this opportunity to thank you and your company for the interest and business support to Lake Bogoria Spa Resort - Kabarak. In this respect we are pleased to offer the following comprehensive 2025 rates applicable to your Company.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All bookings over Easter period from holy Thursday to Easter Monday, and 22 nd  of December through Christmas to new year are subject to supplements as follows:
texts.text: All bookings over Easter period from holy Thursday to Easter Monday, and 22 nd  of December through Christmas to new year are subject to supplements as follows:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Resident adults (13 Years and above) -Ksh 2,500 Per Person.
texts.text: Resident adults (13 Years and above) -Ksh 2,500 Per Person.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Resident Child (13 Years and below) in own room. -Ksh 1,500 per Child ·
texts.text: Resident Child (13 Years and below) in own room. -Ksh 1,500 per Child ·

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Resident Child (13 Years and below) sharing with an adult. Ksh 750 Per Child
texts.text: Resident Child (13 Years and below) sharing with an adult. Ksh 750 Per Child

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Non - Resident adults (13 Years and above) -US$ 35 Per Person.
texts.text: Non - Resident adults (13 Years and above) -US$ 35 Per Person.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Non - Resident Child (13 Years and below) in own room. -US$ 25 per Child
texts.text: Non - Resident Child (13 Years and below) in own room. -US$ 25 per Child

texts.orig: · Non - Resident Child (13 Years and below) sharing with an adult. -US$ 15 Per Child
texts.text: Non - Resident Child (13 Years and below) sharing with an adult. -US$ 15 Per Child

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Note: - Supplements are not commissionable and are charged on a daily basis.
texts.text: Note: - Supplements are not commissionable and are charged on a daily basis.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -  A minimum stay of 3 nights is applicable over the festive days as stated above
texts.text: A minimum stay of 3 nights is applicable over the festive days as stated above

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Unless  the  Company  has  credit  facilities  with  Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak, the Company is required, subject to clause 3 above, to make full payment prior to arrival, failure to which Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak reserves the right to treat the reservation as cancelled. We currently accept  the  following  credit  cards:  Visa,  Master  Card, American  Express  and  Diners  International.  Cheque payments will be accepted only if cleared in advance of arrival. Should payment not be cleared by the bank before guest  arrival,  Lake  Bogoria  Spa  Kabarak  reserves  the right to request cash payment before a guest can checkin.  The  bank  details  are  as  follows:  matters  arising hereunder  shall  be  determined  in  accordance  with  the laws and procedures of Kenya.
texts.text: Unless  the  Company  has  credit  facilities  with  Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak, the Company is required, subject to clause 3 above, to make full payment prior to arrival, failure to which Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak reserves the right to treat the reservation as cancelled. We currently accept  the  following  credit  cards:  Visa,  Master  Card, American  Express  and  Diners  International.  Cheque payments will be accepted only if cleared in advance of arrival. Should payment not be cleared by the bank before guest  arrival,  Lake  Bogoria  Spa  Kabarak  reserves  the right to request cash payment before a guest can checkin.  The  bank  details  are  as  follows:  matters  arising hereunder  shall  be  determined  in  accordance  with  the laws and procedures of Kenya.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations will be honoured with a voucher, an LPO or supporting  document  on  official  letterhead  bearing  the authorized signature advised to Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak  as  set  out  in  the  Schedule  hereto.  Save  for manifest fraud, anything appearing to have been signed by the authorized signatory shall bind the Company. Any change of signatories should be notified to Lake Bogoria Spa  Kabarak  and  will  take  effect  from  the  time  it  is received by Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak. The exact taken up reservations by the Company along with the rooming list  should  be  received  by  Lake  Bogoria  Spa  Kabarak Sales/  Reservations  Office  prior  to  arrival  of  guests  at Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak.
texts.text: Reservations will be honoured with a voucher, an LPO or supporting  document  on  official  letterhead  bearing  the authorized signature advised to Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak  as  set  out  in  the  Schedule  hereto.  Save  for manifest fraud, anything appearing to have been signed by the authorized signatory shall bind the Company. Any change of signatories should be notified to Lake Bogoria Spa  Kabarak  and  will  take  effect  from  the  time  it  is received by Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak. The exact taken up reservations by the Company along with the rooming list  should  be  received  by  Lake  Bogoria  Spa  Kabarak Sales/  Reservations  Office  prior  to  arrival  of  guests  at Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cancellations  should  be  notified  to  Lake  Bogoria  Spa Kabarak's sales/reservations office verbally and followed by  written  notice  of  cancellation.  Cancellation  will  be effective on the working day on which Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak  receives  the  written  notice.  Any  reservations received after 5.00pm will be deemed to be received on the  next  working  day.  Reservations  that  are  cancelled, reduced in length of stay or reduced in numbers are subject to Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak prevailing
texts.text: Cancellations  should  be  notified  to  Lake  Bogoria  Spa Kabarak's sales/reservations office verbally and followed by  written  notice  of  cancellation.  Cancellation  will  be effective on the working day on which Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak  receives  the  written  notice.  Any  reservations received after 5.00pm will be deemed to be received on the  next  working  day.  Reservations  that  are  cancelled, reduced in length of stay or reduced in numbers are subject to Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak prevailing

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cancellation and No-Show Fees which are currently as follows:
texts.text: Cancellation and No-Show Fees which are currently as follows:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The number of days refers to the number of clear days between the cancellation date and the anticipated date of arrival of the guest (excluding the cancellation date and the date of arrival).
texts.text: The number of days refers to the number of clear days between the cancellation date and the anticipated date of arrival of the guest (excluding the cancellation date and the date of arrival).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lake  Bogoria  Spa  Kabarak  may  cancel  reservations  in any of the following events:
texts.text: Lake  Bogoria  Spa  Kabarak  may  cancel  reservations  in any of the following events:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If the Company fails to pay the deposit within 7 days of the due date; or
texts.text: If the Company fails to pay the deposit within 7 days of the due date; or

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak reasonably believes that the Company's financial situation is such that the Company will not be able to honour its obligations under this agreement
texts.text: If Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak reasonably believes that the Company's financial situation is such that the Company will not be able to honour its obligations under this agreement

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Advance deposits where required by Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak are calculated on the total value of the booking and are payable as follows:
texts.text: Advance deposits where required by Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak are calculated on the total value of the booking and are payable as follows:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 50% due if booking is made 8 -14 days prior to arrival 100%  due  if  booking  is  made  0  hrs  -  7  days  prior  to arrival.
texts.text: 50% due if booking is made 8 -14 days prior to arrival 100%  due  if  booking  is  made  0  hrs  -  7  days  prior  to arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In  the  event  that  the  Company  fails  to  pay  the  deposit within 7 days of the due date (where bookings are made 8-14  days  prior  to  arrival)  or  within  24  hours  (where bookings are made 48hrs -7 days prior to arrival) (as the case may be), Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak may treat the reservation as cancelled by the Company.
texts.text: In  the  event  that  the  Company  fails  to  pay  the  deposit within 7 days of the due date (where bookings are made 8-14  days  prior  to  arrival)  or  within  24  hours  (where bookings are made 48hrs -7 days prior to arrival) (as the case may be), Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak may treat the reservation as cancelled by the Company.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations  must  be  guaranteed  by  means  of  cash, cheque, credit card or inter-bank transfer in such amount as required by Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak from time to time and in any event not being less than the cost of one night's rate for the type of  room reserved. Nonguaranteed  reservations  are  subject  to  release  by  Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak at 18:00hrs on the day of expected arrival.
texts.text: Reservations  must  be  guaranteed  by  means  of  cash, cheque, credit card or inter-bank transfer in such amount as required by Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak from time to time and in any event not being less than the cost of one night's rate for the type of  room reserved. Nonguaranteed  reservations  are  subject  to  release  by  Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak at 18:00hrs on the day of expected arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The agreed company rates are only valid for bona fide associates of the Company and may not be revealed to, or used to book for, third parties other than in accordance with the provisions of this clause. The rates agreed here must not be displayed directly over the internet or on third party websites but may be packaged together with airfare and/or other arrangements so that the Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak rates herein are not transparent.
texts.text: The agreed company rates are only valid for bona fide associates of the Company and may not be revealed to, or used to book for, third parties other than in accordance with the provisions of this clause. The rates agreed here must not be displayed directly over the internet or on third party websites but may be packaged together with airfare and/or other arrangements so that the Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak rates herein are not transparent.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A child in a baby cot (up 4 years old) sharing a room with an adult can stay free of charge. Children under 13 years staying in a separate room will be charged at seventy five percent (75%) of the applicable room rate & 50% for a child sharing a room with adult/s.
texts.text: A child in a baby cot (up 4 years old) sharing a room with an adult can stay free of charge. Children under 13 years staying in a separate room will be charged at seventy five percent (75%) of the applicable room rate & 50% for a child sharing a room with adult/s.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rooms are available for new arrivals from 12.00hrs on the scheduled  arrival  date.  Check  out  time  on  the  day  of departure  is  10.00hrs.  Pre-booking  is  encouraged  for early  arrivals  to  guarantee  rooms  upon  arrival  and  a prebooking will be subject to a full overnight rate.
texts.text: Rooms are available for new arrivals from 12.00hrs on the scheduled  arrival  date.  Check  out  time  on  the  day  of departure  is  10.00hrs.  Pre-booking  is  encouraged  for early  arrivals  to  guarantee  rooms  upon  arrival  and  a prebooking will be subject to a full overnight rate.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Day room rate (subject to room availability) is at 75% of applicable  rates.  Check  out  time  for  day  room  use  is 18:00hrs. Check-out after 18:00hrs are subject to the full room rate.
texts.text: Day room rate (subject to room availability) is at 75% of applicable  rates.  Check  out  time  for  day  room  use  is 18:00hrs. Check-out after 18:00hrs are subject to the full room rate.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak will subject to the availability of rooms grant matching complimentary rooms/ guests as follows
texts.text: Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak will subject to the availability of rooms grant matching complimentary rooms/ guests as follows

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Each 15 paying guests in a group the 16 th  person is free to a maximum of 2 single rooms.
texts.text: Each 15 paying guests in a group the 16 th  person is free to a maximum of 2 single rooms.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak's rates include statutory taxes, levies and service charges. In the event that the Government of Kenya adjusts the prevailing or institutes a new tax regime during the duration of this agreement, Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak reserves the right to adjust the rates contained in this agreement accordingly.
texts.text: Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak's rates include statutory taxes, levies and service charges. In the event that the Government of Kenya adjusts the prevailing or institutes a new tax regime during the duration of this agreement, Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak reserves the right to adjust the rates contained in this agreement accordingly.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Credit facilities may be extended to the Company upon meeting  Lake  Bogoria  Spa  Kabarak's  requirements  for such facilities. Where such facilities have been extended, the Company will, subject to the credit approval terms, be permitted make reservations with a voucher, an LPO or letter  of  commitment  bearing  the  authorized  signature, received prior to any arrival.  Subject to Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak's  prevailing  credit  policy  from  time  to  time, invoices  shall  be  raised  in  the  nominated  currency, weekly,  monthly  or  at  the  end  of  guest  stay  at  Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak. On any account where details of payment have not been specified, payment terms will be applied in accordance with this agreement terms.
texts.text: Credit facilities may be extended to the Company upon meeting  Lake  Bogoria  Spa  Kabarak's  requirements  for such facilities. Where such facilities have been extended, the Company will, subject to the credit approval terms, be permitted make reservations with a voucher, an LPO or letter  of  commitment  bearing  the  authorized  signature, received prior to any arrival.  Subject to Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak's  prevailing  credit  policy  from  time  to  time, invoices  shall  be  raised  in  the  nominated  currency, weekly,  monthly  or  at  the  end  of  guest  stay  at  Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak. On any account where details of payment have not been specified, payment terms will be applied in accordance with this agreement terms.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Foreign currency exchange will be at Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak's prevailing rate at the time of guest stay
texts.text: Foreign currency exchange will be at Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak's prevailing rate at the time of guest stay

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any dispute  regarding  an  invoice  must  be  received  by Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak's finance department within seven (7). days of the invoice date, failure to which the Company will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will  be  considered  and  the  Company  notified  of  Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak's
texts.text: Any dispute  regarding  an  invoice  must  be  received  by Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak's finance department within seven (7). days of the invoice date, failure to which the Company will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will  be  considered  and  the  Company  notified  of  Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak's

texts.label: text
texts.orig: determination of the disputed amount. On determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adjusted on the invoice and payment will be due within seven  (7)  days  of  the  adjusted  invoice.  It  is  expressly agreed and declared that any disputes, action or other
texts.text: determination of the disputed amount. On determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adjusted on the invoice and payment will be due within seven  (7)  days  of  the  adjusted  invoice.  It  is  expressly agreed and declared that any disputes, action or other

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Without prejudice to any other rights available to Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak, in the event of default in payment of  undisputed  invoices  and  resolved  invoices,  Lake Bogoria  Spa  Kabarak  reserves  the  right  to  refuse  the Company's clients  admission  into  and  use  of  Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak's facilities until payment is made in full.  Rates  quoted  in  this  agreement  are  subject  to  the Company not defaulting as against the agreed schedule of making  payments.  Where  delays  in  payment  by  the Company  occur,  the  terms  of  Contract  are  in  Lake Bogoria  Spa  Kabarak  sole  discretion  subject  to  change and  may  lead  to  withdrawal  of  credit  terms  previously extended to the Company.
texts.text: Without prejudice to any other rights available to Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak, in the event of default in payment of  undisputed  invoices  and  resolved  invoices,  Lake Bogoria  Spa  Kabarak  reserves  the  right  to  refuse  the Company's clients  admission  into  and  use  of  Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak's facilities until payment is made in full.  Rates  quoted  in  this  agreement  are  subject  to  the Company not defaulting as against the agreed schedule of making  payments.  Where  delays  in  payment  by  the Company  occur,  the  terms  of  Contract  are  in  Lake Bogoria  Spa  Kabarak  sole  discretion  subject  to  change and  may  lead  to  withdrawal  of  credit  terms  previously extended to the Company.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Consistent default shall constitute cause for termination of this agreement. The Company shall be considered to be in  a  condition  of  CONSISTENT  DEFAULT  where invoices submitted have not been paid in full for a period exceeding 60 days.
texts.text: Consistent default shall constitute cause for termination of this agreement. The Company shall be considered to be in  a  condition  of  CONSISTENT  DEFAULT  where invoices submitted have not been paid in full for a period exceeding 60 days.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Company agrees to pay any and all fees, court costs and  other  expenses  incurred  by  Lake  Bogoria  Spa Kabarak  in  the  collection  of  unpaid  invoices  and/or returned cheques.
texts.text: The Company agrees to pay any and all fees, court costs and  other  expenses  incurred  by  Lake  Bogoria  Spa Kabarak  in  the  collection  of  unpaid  invoices  and/or returned cheques.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak shall not be held responsible in the event, and to the extent, that the performance of this agreement is delayed or prevented by any cause beyond its  control,  including  'Acts  of  God'  and  circumstances not due to its fault or negligence. In such circumstances Lake  Bogoria  Spa  Kabarak  shall  be  relieved  of  its obligations under this agreement.
texts.text: Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak shall not be held responsible in the event, and to the extent, that the performance of this agreement is delayed or prevented by any cause beyond its  control,  including  'Acts  of  God'  and  circumstances not due to its fault or negligence. In such circumstances Lake  Bogoria  Spa  Kabarak  shall  be  relieved  of  its obligations under this agreement.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak reserves the right at any time, by  giving  notice  in  writing,  to  cancel  this  Agreement should  the  Company  fail  to  fulfil  the  above  terms  and conditions. Upon such cancellation all sums outstanding from the Company shall be immediately due and payable.
texts.text: Lake Bogoria Spa Kabarak reserves the right at any time, by  giving  notice  in  writing,  to  cancel  this  Agreement should  the  Company  fail  to  fulfil  the  above  terms  and conditions. Upon such cancellation all sums outstanding from the Company shall be immediately due and payable.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Kenya.
texts.text: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Kenya.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We are confident that the tranquillity of our facilities and numerous recreational activities will provide your guests with the perfect environment to relax and unwind, however our greatest amenity is the personalized service your guest will receive. This agreement is issued in two copies and the company is kindly requested to sign, date, initial all pages, stamp both copies and return one copy to our office. The agreement will only become effective upon receipt of the completed signed copy.

This agreement is issued in two copies and the company is kindly requested to sign, date, initial all pages, stamp both copies and return one copy to our office. The agreement will only become effective upon receipt of the completed signed copy.
